tests.name: writes PREFERRED_LANGUAGE to .env.claude and appends CLAUDE.md block
expects: asks the user for a preferred language
CLAUDE.md contains a '## Interaction Language' heading
confirmation message is shown in the chosen language

tests.name: is idempotent — does not duplicate the CLAUDE.md block on re-run
setup:
printf '# Demo

## Interaction Language

existing block
' > CLAUDE.md
expects: CLAUDE.md still has exactly one '## Interaction Language' heading
PREFERRED_LANGUAGE line is updated in place, not duplicated

tests.name: stops when .env.claude is missing
expects: tells the user to run /init-project first
